_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-020 (AI, cosine: 0.373), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.371).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.400). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [actions, conduct, mission, pre] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.879, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Conduct pre-mission actions" and "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.378 ≈ STS 0.400 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [actions, conduct, mission, pre]. WIDAI terms: [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation].
